Camera.Triple:: 200 MP, f/1.7, 23mm (wide), 1/1.4", 0.56µm, dual-pixel PDAF, OIS 50 MP, f/2.9, 80mm (periscope telephoto), 1/2.76", 0.64µm, dual-pixel PDAF, OIS, 3.5x optical zoom 8 MP, f/2.2, 112˚ (ultrawide), 1.12µm

Design.SIM:: Nano-SIM + Nano-SIM + eSIM (max 2 at a time)
Design.Others:: IP64 dust tight and water resistant (water splashes) Active matrix display (on the back)

Battery.Charging:: 100W wired, 50% in 18 min, 100% in 48 min 50W wireless 7.5W reverse wired 5W reverse wireless Bypass Charging (gaming, navigating)

Hardware.OS:: Android 16, up to 3 major Android upgrades, XOS 16
Hardware.CPU:: Octa-core (1x3.25 GHz Cortex-A725 & 3x3.0 GHz Cortex-A725 & 4x2.1 GHz Cortex-A725)

Multimedia.3.5mm jack:: No Tuned by JBL 24-bit/192kHz Hi-Res & Hi-Res wireless audio

Connectivity & Features.Sensors:: Fingerprint (under display, optical), accelerometer, gyro, proximity, compass, heart rate, SpO2 Two-way satellite communication service (provided by Space42's Thuraya product line; requires separate plan and SIM)
